name: useDeviceMotion
description: Hook that work with device motion
examples: const { interval, rotationRate, acceleration, accelerationIncludingGravity } = useDeviceMotion(500, (event) => console.log(event));
const { interval, rotationRate, acceleration, accelerationIncludingGravity } = useDeviceMotion((event) => console.log(event));
const { interval, rotationRate, acceleration, accelerationIncludingGravity } = useDeviceMotion();

parameters.name: callback
parameters.description: The callback function to be invoked

source.source: * @param {(event: DeviceMotionEvent) => void} [callback] The callback function to be invoked

tokens.name: [callback]
tokens.description: The callback function to be invoked

source.source: * @returns {UseDeviceMotionReturn} The device motion data and interval
